name: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd.
business: Bowman is a professional services firm delivering integrated engineering, technical consulting and program management services to customers who own, develop, and maintain the built environment. As of December 31, 2025, we have a workforce of over 2,300 employees and operate from more than 135 locations throughout the United States and four offices in Mexico. For the year ended December 31, 2025, we did not have any individual customer that represented more than 5% of our gross contract revenue.
sellsTo: public sector: transportation departments, utilities, government agencies (federal, state, local), military branches, school systems, water authorities

private sector: investor-owned utilities, oil & gas extractors and refiners, pipeline operators, renewable energy and decarbonization participants, data center developers and hyper-scalers, wastewater treatment facilities, residential and commercial real estate developers, mine operators

exposures.sentence: Artificial Intelligence (AI) presents risks, challenges, and unintended consequences that could affect its adoption, and therefore our business.
Our private sector customers include infrastructure owners and operators from multiple industries such as ... data center developers and hyper-scalers

Within our power, utility and energy services practice we work for customers that include large electric transmission systems, gas utilities, data center developers and hyper-scalers, and renewables and decarbonization solutions providers.
Lazen Power Engineering, LLC ... specializing in the design and construction oversight of high-voltage transmission line (HVTL) infrastructure.
Our private sector customers include infrastructure owners and operators from multiple industries such as investor-owned utilities, oil & gas extractors and refiners, pipeline operators
Our private sector customers include ... participants in the renewable energy and decarbonization marketplace
We serve the Southwest U.S. copper mining industry where we have developed specialized capabilities over time.
Bowman is a professional services firm delivering integrated engineering, technical consulting and program management services to customers who own, develop, and maintain the built environment.

Within the residential market there are fundamentally three sub-markets in which our customers participate: 1) for-sale residential housing; 2) multi-family rental housing, and 3) mixed-use and urban cluster developments.

Renewable energy encompasses all activities supporting the energy sector’s reduction of fossil-based inputs in energy production in favor of renewable energy sources such as wind and solar, in combination with battery storage.
Our private sector customers include infrastructure owners and operators from multiple industries such as ... oil & gas extractors and refiners, pipeline operators
Our public sector assignments originate from customers that are ... military branches

catalysts.event: CEO Gary Bowman announces retirement and board initiates search for successor
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, our founder, Chief Executive Officer and director, Gary Bowman, announced his intention to retire later this year in connection with the appointment of his successor.

catalysts.event: Amendment of revolving credit facility to $250 million
catalysts.sentence: On March 3, 2026, we entered in to a Third Amendment to the Credit Agreement and Joinder Agreement, which increased the maximum aggregate revolving commitments from $210.0 million to $250.0 million.

catalysts.event: Launch of Bowman Innovation Growth Fund (BIG Fund) with $25 million commitment
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, we launched an internal innovation incubator we called the Bowman Innovation Growth Fund (BIG Fund) and committed to $25 million of investment toward ideas developed by our workforce.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. engineering services market spending projected to rise from ~$410 billion in 2026 to over $530 billion by 2031 (5.4% CAGR)
tamClaims.sentence: Forecasts from Mordor Intelligence predict steady growth throughout the remainder of the decade, with market spending projected to rise from approximately $410 billion in 2026 to over $530 billion by 2031, corresponding to an approximately 5.4% compound annual growth rate over this period.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. engineering services market could exceed $580 billion by 2030 (Grand View Research)
tamClaims.sentence: Estimates from Grand View Research suggest the U.S. engineering services market could in fact exceed $580 billion by 2030 supported by sustained public infrastructure investment, technological innovation, and cross-sector demand for engineering, design, and technical services.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for infrastructure-related asset, program and project management services in the U.S. projected to expand from ~$1.50 trillion in 2026 to over $2.25 trillion by 2034
tamClaims.sentence: The total addressable market for infrastructure-related asset, program and project management services in the United States is anchored in the broader domestic infrastructure investment landscape, which, according to Market Data Forecast is projected to expand from approximately $1.50 trillion in 2026 to over $2.25 trillion by 2034, at a mid-single-digit compound annual growth rate.

tamClaims.claim: Specialized infrastructure asset management services market estimated to reach more than $23 billion by 2034 (Statifacts)
tamClaims.sentence: Projected growth in specialized infrastructure asset management services, estimated by Statifacts to reach more than $23 billion by 2034, further demonstrates the increasing emphasis on asset lifecycle planning and strategic execution that complements engineering engagements.
